opening_line: My uncle Volodymyr just walked past my door going downstairs. I called him on his phone. He answered from his apartment on four. He's still talking to me.
notes_for_player: Duplicate on CAM 02 and CAM 04. Same clothing signature.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: He's on two right now. I hear him on the phone on four. Both voices.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: Grey jacket. Same bald spot. Same limp from the knee surgery.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Started two minutes ago. He's asking me why I'm crying.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Pull up both floors. Tell me which one is the real one. Please.
